title: medicago murex subsp. sphaerocarpos
intro: Medicago murex subsp. sphaerocarpos is a sub-species of the Medicago murex plant, also known as the Egyptian clover or Egyptian medick, which is a type of legume belonging to the pea family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are used to treat conditions such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Medicago murex subsp. sphaerocarpos include its ability to reduce blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to prevent certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can also be used as a poultice to treat skin conditions and wounds.
